requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and Site EMC / Power-Quality Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互通性与现场EMC / 电能质量证据
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互通性與現場 EMC / 電能質量證據

summary.en: Albania projects commonly implement networked charging through project-level back-office and utility coordination. OCPP readiness, remote monitoring, fault reporting, and load-management behavior should match the project contract, while EMC and power-quality evidence should align with IEC 61000 expectations for the local 50 Hz 230/400 V profile.
summary.zh: 阿尔巴尼亚项目通常通过项目级后台和电网协调实施联网充电。OCPP就绪、远程监控、故障上报和负荷管理行为应与项目合同一致，同时EMC和电能质量证据应与本地230/400 V、50 Hz电网环境下的IEC 61000要求一致。
summary.zht: 阿爾巴尼亞項目通常透過項目級後台和電網協調實施聯網充電。OCPP 就緒、遠端監控、故障上報和負載管理行為應與項目合同一致，同時 EMC 和電能質量證據應與本地 230/400 V、50 Hz 電網環境下的 IEC 61000 要求一致。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific OCPP version and cybersecurity requirements
IEC 61000 series for EMC and power quality
Albanian utility coordination for connected chargers

summary.en: China domestic networked charging often uses GB/T 27930 in the charger-to-vehicle control path and domestic telemetry stacks. These materials support technical design comparison, but OCPP interoperability and Albanian site-level EMC evidence usually need separate confirmation.
summary.zh: 中国国内联网充电常在车桩控制路径使用 GB/T 27930 通讯标准及国内遥测体系。这些资料可用于技术设计比较，但OCPP互通性与阿尔巴尼亚现场EMC证据通常仍需单独确认。
summary.zht: 中國國內聯網充電常在車樁控制路徑使用 GB/T 27930 通訊標準及國內遙測體系。這些資料可用於技術設計比較，但 OCPP 互通性與阿爾巴尼亞現場 EMC 證據通常仍需另行確認。

gap.en: Confirm required OCPP profile and security model at project stage, and produce interoperability test logs, remote-control traces, EMC and harmonic reports, and utility interface evidence before public operation.
gap.zh: 应在项目阶段确认所需 OCPP 配置及安全模型，并在投入公共运营前提供互操作测试日志、远程控制轨迹、EMC与谐波报告及电网接口证据。
gap.zht: 應在項目階段確認所需 OCPP 配置及安全模型，並在投入公共運營前提供互操作測試日誌、遠端控制軌跡、EMC與諧波報告及電網介面證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory for networked public chargers and fleet charging sites requiring remote operations
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T telemetry evidence does not replace Albania project OCPP or utility coordination requirements

source.publisher: Open Charge Alliance and Energy Regulatory Entity (ERE), Albania

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Albania-facing public charging, align OCPP scope with the project operator and produce site-level EMC and power-quality evidence before claiming operational readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向阿尔巴尼亚的公共充电应根据项目运营方明确OCPP范围，并在宣称可运营前补齐现场EMC和电能质量证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向阿爾巴尼亞的公共充電應根據項目運營方明確 OCPP 範圍，並在宣稱可運作前補齊現場 EMC 和電能質量證據。
